meaning: n.流体动力学,液体动力学
examples: Think of it as the Bonneville Salt Flats of hydrokinetics: EMEC offers companies a place to try out their clean tech.
The algorithm for body-fitted coordinate grids generation is one of the key techniques of numerical simulation in hydrokinetics.
The computer simulation of fluid flow in pit furnace when large sized gears gas carburized has been done using the theory of hydrokinetics.
